generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-resolution 3D LiDAR capturing point clouds of vehicle surroundings for object detection and tracking. Used in conjunction with DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering for object track generation."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance IntelRealSenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Depth and RGB camera providing environmental perception data, fused with LiDAR inputs for unified environmental modeling."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CameraDepthData
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensors (encoders/IMUs) continuously monitoring ego vehicle speed and steering angle for real-time state tracking."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateData
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Raw 3D point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR, transmitted via ROS2 middleware to Data Collection FE in Digital Twin Entity."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance CameraDepthData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Depth and RGB data from Intel RealSense D435i, processed and fused with LiDAR data for environmental perception."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelRealSenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle) transmitted via ROS2 middleware to Digital Twin Entity."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance ProcessedObjectTracks : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Object tracks generated via DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering from raw LiDAR point clouds, transmitted to Digital Twin Entity."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance LiDARPointCloudModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR data processed via DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering to generate object tracks for ACC decision-making."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance CameraDepthModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Depth and RGB data fused with LiDAR for unified environmental perception model supporting ACC operations."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SensorFusionEnabler
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Implements ISO 15622 performance class I for basic speed adjustment based on lead vehicle distance and safety margins."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCComputationEnabler
]

instance RealTimeVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle) and object tracks for ACC computation."
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateData, ProcessedObjectTracks
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCComputationEnabler, DataMonitoringEnabler
]

instance HistoricalACCData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Post-hoc analysis data stored in external SQL database for anomaly detection and parameter tuning."
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AnomalyDetectionEnabler, ParameterTuningEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance PointCloudProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Implements DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering for LiDAR point cloud processing into object tracks."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataPreProcessingService
]

instance SensorFusionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Fuses LiDAR and camera data into unified environmental model for ACC decision-making."
    DTDFVocab:enables EnvironmentalPerceptionService
]

instance ACCComputationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Executes ACC control logic (ISO 15622 performance class I) for speed adjustments and safety margin maintenance."
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCControlService
]

instance DataMonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state, object tracks, and projected path via 3D Visualization UI."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance AnomalyDetectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Post-hoc analysis of historical ACC data for detecting anomalies like sudden braking events."
    DTDFVocab:enables AnomalyDetectionService
]

instance ParameterTuningEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Developer interface for adjusting ACC parameters (desired speed, safety margins) via Control Panel."
    DTDFVocab:enables ParameterTuningService
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Serializes and translates data between ROS2 message formats for Wi-Fi transmission between Physical and Digital Twin Entities."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Middleware facilitating inter-component communication between sensors, actuators, and Digital Twin Entity."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataCollectionService, ActuationService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataPreProcessingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Pre-processes raw sensor data (point cloud clustering, object tracking) before transmission to Digital Twin Entity."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataPreProcessingInsight
]

instance EnvironmentalPerceptionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates unified environmental model from fused LiDAR/camera data for ACC decision-making."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnvironmentalPerceptionInsight
]

instance ACCControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computes ACC commands (speed adjustments, safety margins) based on lead vehicle tracking and ISO 15622 standards."
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCPerformanceInsight, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state, object tracks, and projected path via 3D Visualization UI."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance AnomalyDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Post-hoc analysis of historical ACC data to detect anomalies like sudden braking events."
    DTDFVocab:provides AnomalyDetectionInsight
]

instance ParameterTuningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Developer interface for adjusting ACC parameters (desired speed, safety margins) via Control Panel."
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterTuningInsight
]

instance DataTranslationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Serializes and translates data between ROS2 message formats for Wi-Fi transmission between entities."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTranslationInsight
]

instance DataCollectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Collects real-time data streams from Physical Twin Entity for Digital Twin processing."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataCollectionInsight
]

instance ActuationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Translates high-level commands into low-level motor/servo signals for vehicle actuation."
    DTDFVocab:provides MotorActuationAction, SteeringActuationAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance DataPreProcessingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Processed object tracks and environmental data ready for ACC computation."
]

instance EnvironmentalPerceptionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Unified environmental model combining LiDAR and camera data for ACC decision-making."
]

instance ACCPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of following distance, speed adjustments, and object track stability via 3D Visualization UI."
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Live display of ego vehicle state, object tracks, and projected path for operator monitoring."
]

instance AnomalyDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identified anomalies in historical ACC data (e.g., sudden braking events) for post-hoc analysis."
]

instance ParameterTuningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized ACC parameters (desired speed, safety margins) based on real-time monitoring data."
]

instance DataTranslationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Successfully serialized and translated data between ROS2 message formats for inter-entity communication."
]

instance DataCollectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time data streams from Physical Twin Entity successfully collected for Digital Twin processing."
]

instance MotorActuationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed commands into physical motor movements via Electronic Speed Controller."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SteeringActuationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusts vehicle steering angle based on commands from Digital Twin Entity."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Triggers emergency braking via motor actuation system based on remote commands."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Converts voltage commands into physical motor movements for speed control, interfaced with lower-level chassis."
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Adjusts vehicle steering angle based on commands from Digital Twin Entity, integrated into lower-level chassis."
]

// C1: Components
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Hosts all Physical Twin-specific functionality (sensors, actuators) on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano, serving as real-time data source for Digital Twin."
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Executes core Digital Twin logic (ACC computation, data collection) on separate hardware (cloud/edge), receiving data via ROS2 middleware."
]

instance UserInterfaceFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Unified user-facing interface decomposed into sub-components (3D Visualization, Control Panel) for modularity."
]

instance DataCollectionFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Receives real-time data streams from Physical Twin Entity via ROS2 middleware for Digital Twin processing."
]

instance DataPreProcessingFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Pre-processes raw sensor data (point cloud clustering via DBSCAN, tracking via Kalman filter) before transmission."
]

instance ControlPanelUI : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Developer interface for remote ACC management (enable/disable, parameter tuning, emergency braking)."
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationUI : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of vehicle state, object tracks, and projected path for operator monitoring."
]

instance ACCControllingFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Implements ACC control logic (ISO 15622 performance class I) for speed adjustments and safety margin maintenance."
]

instance ReportingFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Generates human-readable timeseries reports of object tracks and vehicle state for post-analysis."
]

// C12: Environments
instance TraxxasSlash4x4VehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10-scale autonomous vehicle platform retrofitted with autonomy components for ACC Digital Twin development."
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance DigitalTwinProcessingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Separate hardware component (cloud/edge) executing core Digital Twin logic and services."
    base:contains DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance UserInteractionEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Unified interface environment for operators and developers to interact with the Digital Twin."
    base:contains UserInterfaceFE
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The interactions from the virtual twin (DT) to the physical twin (PT) include:
  - **Desired speed commands** computed by the **ACC Controlling FE** (based on lead vehicle distance) sent back to the PT’s **Actuation FE** for motor control.
  - **Remote management commands** (e.g., enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, emergency braking) transmitted from the **User Entity’s Control Panel** to the **Actuation FE** via ROS2/Wi-Fi.
  - **Actuation signals** (voltage commands for motor/servo) generated by the **Actuation FE** in the Physical Twin Entity, interfaced with the **Vedder Electronic Speed Controller** and steering servo.
  The system enforces a **maximum end-to-end latency of 100 ms** (per **R7**) for real-time control, with clock synchronization accuracy of **±100 ms** across devices."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates at **real-time scales** with the following constraints:
  - **Perception cycle**: Object tracks (e.g., lead vehicle) are updated continuously based on LiDAR/camera fusion, with processing latency dependent on the **Data Pre-Processing FE** (clustering/tracking).
  - **Control loop**: ACC decisions (speed adjustments) are computed in the **Controlling FE** and transmitted to the PT with a **maximum end-to-end latency of 100 ms** (per **R7**), aligned with **3GPP V2V communication standards**.
  - **Clock synchronization**: Devices in the DT constellation are synchronized to **±100 ms accuracy** (per **R8**) to ensure event ordering and data integrity in distributed operations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation follows an **entity-based architecture** inspired by **ISO 23247**, with the following orchestration:
  - **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosts PT-specific components (e.g., **Actuation FE**, **Data Pre-Processing FE**) on the **Jetson Orin Nano**.
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Executes core logic (e.g., **Data Collection FE**, **Controlling FE**, **Reporting FE**) on separate hardware (cloud/edge).
  - **User Entity**: Provides a unified interface via **3D Visualization** and **Control Panel** (decomposed from the monolithic **User Interface FE** in ISO 23247).
  - **Cross-System Entity**: **Data Translation FE** handles data serialization and unit conversion across entities.
  The constellation is **distributed** but **logically centralized**, with entities deployed on distinct hardware (PT, cloud/edge, UI). Communication follows a **pub-sub model** via ROS2."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT supports the following lifecycle stages:
  - **Design/Development**: Used as a **cyber-physical experimentation facility** for ACC algorithm validation (e.g., testing ISO 15622 compliance) and troubleshooting via data monitoring.
  - **Operation**: Enables **real-time optimization** (e.g., fuel economy via ACC tuning) and **predictive maintenance** (e.g., brake system health monitoring, though not explicitly implemented in this case study).
  - **Lifecycle Management**: Acts as a **digital thread** tool for end-to-end information flow, though the document focuses on the **as-operated** phase (post-manufacturing).
  The DT covers the **as-operated** representation phase, with fidelity to the PT’s real-time behavior (e.g., sensor data, actuation commands)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Real-time synchronization**: **±100 ms clock accuracy** and **100 ms end-to-end latency** (per **R7–R8**) to maintain temporal alignment between PT and DT.
  - **Sensor fusion**: LiDAR and camera data are fused to generate accurate object tracks, validated via **DBSCAN** and **Kalman filtering**.
  - **Compliance testing**: ACC logic adheres to **ISO 15622 performance class I**, with real-world validation on the **1/10-scale PT**.
  - **Data integrity**: **Data Translation FE** ensures consistent data formats and unit conversions across entities.
  Uncertainty sources include:
  - **Sensor noise** (e.g., LiDAR/camera inaccuracies).
  - **Network jitter** (Wi-Fi latency variability).
  Verification mechanisms include **ROS2 node lifecycle management** and **real-time monitoring** via the **3D Visualization UI**."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between PT and DT includes:
  - **Network Protocol**: **ROS2 middleware** for intra-entity communication; **Wi-Fi** for inter-entity communication (DT ↔ PT).
  - **Data Serialization**: **ROS2 message formats** (e.g., custom message types for object tracks, vehicle state) translated via the **Data Translation FE**.
  - **Latency Requirements**: **≤100 ms end-to-end latency** (per **3GPP V2V standards**) enforced via **clock synchronization (±100 ms)** and **real-time ROS2 nodes**.
  - **Hardware Interfaces**:
    - **PT ↔ Actuators**: **Vedder ESC** for motor/servo control.
    - **PT ↔ Sensors**: **LiDAR/camera** data streamed via ROS2 topics to the Digital Twin Entity."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed across:
  - **Physical Twin (PT)**: Hosts the **Physical Twin Entity** (e.g., **Actuation FE**, **Data Pre-Processing FE**) on the **NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano** with **ROS2** and **Jetpack 5.0**.
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Executes core logic (e.g., **ACC Controlling FE**, **Data Collection FE**) on **separate hardware** (cloud/edge, not specified).
  - **User Entity**: Runs on a **dedicated UI system** (e.g., PC/laptop) for **3D Visualization** and **Control Panel**.
  The architecture supports **modular upgrades** (e.g., adding new FEs) and **scalability** (e.g., distributed Digital Twin Entity components)."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration is enabled through:
  - **Standardized communication interfaces**: **ROS2** for intra-system modularity and **Wi-Fi** for inter-entity data exchange.
  - **External data storage**: **SQL database** for historical data, decoupling storage from the vehicle’s limited onboard capacity.
  - **Potential interoperability**: The architecture could integrate with **vehicle OEM systems** or **external ADAS platforms** via standardized protocols (e.g., **OPC UA**, **ROS2 bridges**), though this is not explicitly implemented in the case study.
  The system adheres to **R1 (standardized interface)** to facilitate future extensions."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards:
  - **Architectural Standard**: **ISO 23247 Part 2 (Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework Reference Architecture)**, adapted for automotive use with deviations (e.g., **Physical Twin Entity**).
  - **ACC Standard**: **ISO 15622** for performance class I implementation.
  - **Communication Standards**:
    - **ROS2** for middleware (aligned with **ROS Consortium** standards).
    - **3GPP V2V (22.185)** for latency requirements.
  - **Clock Synchronization**: **±100 ms accuracy** (less stringent than automotive safety standards but justified by hardware limitations)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety and security considerations include:
  - **Real-time Constraints**: **100 ms latency** and **±100 ms clock sync** ensure timely actuation (e.g., emergency braking) but may not meet stricter automotive safety standards (e.g., **ISO 26262**).
  - **Remote Operation**: The DT enables **remote management** (e.g., emergency braking) but lacks explicit safety mechanisms for **fail-safe operation** (e.g., manual override guarantees).
  - **Data Integrity**: **Data Translation FE** ensures consistent data formats but does not address **cybersecurity threats** (e.g., spoofing, jamming).
  - **Hardware Limitations**: **Jetson Orin Nano** and **Wi-Fi** may introduce vulnerabilities (e.g., network latency spikes), though not quantified in the document.
  The system is classified as a **Fully Autonomous Digital Twin with Human-in-the-Loop** (per **David and Bork taxonomy**), implying operator oversight for critical decisions."
]
